case_title: CITRON, BEN VS IONIX TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY CITRON, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT IONIX TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IONIX TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITRON, BEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IONIX TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,848.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26166, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITRON, BEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IONIX TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $74 FOR COURT COSTS. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26166 ON 2-16-00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF FILED; (RE: $74.00 COURTCOSTS)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IONIX TECHNOLOGY CORPORATION
